title: 60th Birthday Banner, 60th Happy Birthday Backdrop Banner, Party Decorations for Indoor Outdoor, Black Gold Sign Poster Photo Background Banners for Men Women(180 x 110 cm)
features: 【High-quality Materials】The birthday banner is made of durable polyester fabric, which is soft, lightweight, tear-resistant, foldable and washable. It is made of digital printing, hot cutting edges, pressed copper buckles and other processes, with bright colors, clear printing, high color fastness and not easy to fade

【Unique Design】This birthday decoration background banner contains party elements such as balloons, flags, gifts and ribbons, as well as bright black and gold. The combination of the two is enough to light up your party atmosphere, bring surprises to you and your guests, and leave unforgettable memories

【Extra Large Size】180*110cm(5.9ft*3.6ft) Extra large size enough to be used as 60th birthday party wall decorations or photography background. Create a pleasant and warm atmosphere for your party and add more colors to your birthday celebration

【Easy to Use】Our 60th birthday party banner provides 1 rope with a length of 10m/32.8ft, just pass through the 4 holes in the corner and adjust the appropriate length to hang on the wall, window, garden, photo booth, fence and other places you want to decorate

【Applicable Occasions 】Our happy birthday decoration banner is suitable for birthday-themed parties, gift-giving parties, celebrations, garden parties, etc. It can be used indoors and outdoors. In order to achieve the ideal display state, it is recommended that you use a steam machine to iron, and be careful not to iron with too hot heat
description: ANOMM Happy Birthday Backdrop Banner Features: 1. Unique party elements and color matching, add highlights to your party 2. Lightweight, washable, tear-resistant, reusable 3. There are copper rings on the four corners, and the matching ropes are used to bind and hang Specifications: Material: Polyester Color: Black Pink/Black Gold Size: 180*110cm Weight: 157g Packing list: 1 birthday decoration background banner 1 roll of string Note: 1. In order to achieve the ideal display effect, it is recommended that you use a steam machine to iron, and be careful not to use too hot heat for ironing 2.Due to manual measurement, there may be a certain size error 3.Due to the shooting environment, there may be a certain color difference If you have any questions about our products, please feel free to contact us We will give you a satisfactory reply as soon as possible
